_meta.title: GMFSS Fortuna — requires cupy. FALLBACK: use FILM VFI or RIFE VFI instead.

_meta.description: Takes 2+ keyframes and interpolates between them using GMFSS Fortuna (4x). Requires cupy — fallback to FILM VFI or RIFE VFI if cupy unavailable.

tested_alternatives.FILM VFI: WORKS — pure PyTorch, no cupy needed. Good quality, some ghosting on mid-frames.
tested_alternatives.RIFE VFI: WORKS — pure PyTorch, no cupy needed. Slightly cleaner than FILM, less ghosting.

constraints.attention: SDPA only — do NOT install xformers
constraints.known_issue: GMFSS Fortuna requires cupy module. Without it, use FILM or RIFE VFI.
